offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 orders/month, inconsistent stock levels cause late orders. We monitor stock levels and replenishment instead of manual inventory tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent stock levels leading to late orders.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums where Etsy sellers share tools
try_it: Let users try real-time stock updates on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing inventory data
